steps.name: environment-foundation
steps.summary: Confirmed local LOVE CLI at C:\Program Files\LOVE\lovec.exe (LOVE 11.5), no luac on PATH, added PowerShell env/syntax/package scripts, and created build/ plus build/windows/.

steps.name: project-skeleton
steps.summary: Created main.lua/conf.lua, core state/game/input/save_manager skeletons, and workspace folders for src/data/assets/saves/build without adding progress saves.

steps.name: scene-shells
steps.summary: Added title/game/pause/gameover/ending scene shells with mouse-click transitions, child_room restart hook, and minimal settings/inventory/map placeholders.

steps.name: room-navigation
steps.summary: Added data-driven Stage 1 room navigation via data/rooms.lua, data/room_objects.lua, src/systems/room_system.lua, src/systems/interaction_system.lua, and wired game_scene.lua to start at child_room and move by door or edge hitboxes.

steps.name: inventory-items
steps.summary: Added data/items.lua with the 10 Stage 1 items, runtime-only inventory system/UI, item_pickup handling in interaction_system, and wired game_scene inventory selection/use flow without progress saves.

steps.name: map-ui
steps.summary: Added runtime-only map_system/map_ui with 1F/2F/basement/attic floor plans, map button toggle, current-room marker, and removed always-on room-name display from gameplay.

steps.name: stage-data
steps.summary: Added Stage 1 data files for puzzle inputs/chains, events, monster nodes, sound metadata, and stage rules; aligned room/item resource paths and clue object ids for downstream systems.
